evals.prompt: 변경된 코드에 대해 종합 웹 품질 검토를 실행해줘
evals.expected_output: 2개 영역(접근성 + SEO&웹성능) 순차 실행, 통합 HTML+CSV 리포트 생성
expectations: Reads skills/web-quality-audit/SKILL.md via Read tool
Delegates to accessibility skill (KWCAG2.2 33항목 + 시맨틱 HTML)
Delegates to seo skill (SEO-01~11 + WP-01~18)
Analyzes actual target files in both areas
Identifies specific issues per area with item IDs
Generates unified HTML report in reports/web-quality/YYYYMMDD-HHmm/report.html
Generates unified CSV report in reports/web-quality/YYYYMMDD-HHmm/report.csv
Report contains both Section A (접근성) and Section B (SEO & Web Performance)

evals.prompt: index.html이랑 Card.tsx만 대상으로 웹 품질 전체 감사해줘
evals.expected_output: 지정된 2개 파일에 대해 접근성 + SEO&웹성능 전체 검토, 통합 리포트 생성
expectations: Reads skills/web-quality-audit/SKILL.md via Read tool
Uses only the specified files (index.html, Card.tsx) as review targets
Does not run git diff to find additional files
Delegates to accessibility skill with the specified file set
Delegates to seo skill with the specified file set
Generates unified HTML + CSV report combining both areas
Report covers KWCAG2.2 items, semantic HTML, SEO-01~11, WP-01~18

evals.prompt: dashboard.tsx 하나만 종합 품질 검토해줘. 접근성이랑 성능 이슈 위주로 자세히 봐줘
evals.expected_output: 단일 파일 대상 접근성 + SEO&웹성능 검토, 접근성/성능 이슈 상세 분석
expectations: Reads skills/web-quality-audit/SKILL.md via Read tool
Delegates to accessibility skill for dashboard.tsx
Delegates to seo skill for dashboard.tsx
Accessibility findings include specific KWCAG item IDs and line references
WP findings include image optimization (WP-04~06) and JS performance (WP-07~09) checks
Generates unified HTML + CSV report
Fix guide section contains concrete code-level recommendations
